title: Count Tally Marks
description: Determine the quantity represented by a group of tally marks.
condition: A set of tally marks representing a quantity.
response: Count the tally marks (recognizing groups of five if present) and state the total.
label: Production / Skill
notes: Often relies on perceptual grouping of five.

title: Count Total Objects Across Categories
description: Find the total number of objects by combining counts from multiple categories.
condition: Given counts for two or more categories of objects.
response: Add the category counts to find the total number of objects.
label: Principle / Model
example: If there are 5 squares, 6 triangles, and 3 circles, then total = $5 + 6 + 3 = 14$.
notes: May involve counting all marks or using known sums.

title: Sort Objects by Attribute
description: Group objects according to a shared attribute such as shape.
condition: A set of objects with observable attributes (e.g., number of sides, shape type).
response: Place each object into a category defined by a chosen attribute.
label: Rule / Plan
example: Sort pattern blocks into triangles, rhombi, and squares.
notes: Attribute may vary; correctness depends on consistent grouping.
